questionHtml: Describe the relationship between rock phosphate production and world population.
markschemeHtml:
a. as population increases so does phosphate production/positive correlation ✔

b. since 1985 phosphate production has not risen while population has continued to increase ✔

meta.title: Describe the relationship between rock phosphate production and world population.
